greeting.title: Hello I'm
about.profession: I am Johan Vargas, AI Engineer & Full Stack Engineer.
about.description: AI Engineer and Full Stack Engineer with 6+ years of experience building scalable digital products, enterprise applications, and AI-powered systems. Specialized in LLM integrations, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), semantic search, AI agents, and intelligent backend architectures using Python, FastAPI, Qdrant, and Microsoft Azure AI Foundry. Strong experience designing modern full-stack applications with React, Next.js, Angular, Node.js, and TypeScript — combining scalable frontend architectures with robust backend systems and cloud infrastructure.
portfolio.subtitle-have-done: Here's what I have done with the past
work.boz-ai: Leading the transformation of the company's ERP/CRM into an AI-powered platform, integrating intelligent workflows and AI-driven features. Designed and implemented RAG pipelines with semantic search using Qdrant. Built AI backend services with Python and FastAPI integrated into full-stack architectures. Developed AI agents using MCP to automate workflows and connect enterprise tools.
work.boz-senior: Led the modernization and complete architectural redesign of the company's internal ERP/CRM platform using Next.js, React, .NET, and Node.js. Refactored a legacy platform into a modern and scalable architecture in just over one month. Introduced AI-driven workflows and intelligent automation, creating the technical foundation for the company's AI initiatives.
work.heinsohn: Developed enterprise web applications using Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, and scalable frontend architectures. Implemented microfrontend solutions and reactive programming patterns, reducing load times by 30%. Optimized memory management and applied software design patterns, reducing memory leaks by 40%. Led training of new team members and promoted engineering best practices.
work.devpro: Developed full-stack applications using React, Angular, Ionic, Node.js, and TypeScript for multiple client projects. Designed and optimized backend services with Node.js and REST APIs, improving server performance by 25%. Implemented CI/CD pipelines and proposed internal tools that increased team productivity by 20%.
work.idea: Built frontend prototypes and improved UX/UI experiences using React and Angular. Developed asynchronous APIs using Slim PHP with non-blocking execution patterns. Refactored frontend architectures to improve maintainability, scalability, and performance.
blog.neural-description: In the books *The Secret Life of the Mind* and *The Power of Words* by Mariano Sigman, I liked how he approaches, from both a scientific and personal perspective, the topic of neuroscience, a field that I consider very important for understanding how our mind works in everyday life, both in our decisions, emotions, the rational, and the subconscious.
blog.space-description: I love space and the James Webb telescope because they offer a unique opportunity to explore the universe. The James Webb, with its advanced ability to observe the cosmos in infrared wavelengths, allows us to see beyond what other telescopes have been able to. Its images of distant galaxies and exoplanets bring us closer to a deeper understanding of the universe.
blog.ia-description: Nuclear energy, with its ability to provide continuous and powerful energy, is crucial for powering AI systems that demand large amounts of power. This synergy would not only drive technological advancement but could also be the key to a smarter and more sustainable future.
other.projects-sub: Transforming Business Systems with Intelligent Automation
ai-project.description: Comprehensive transformation of the company's internal ERP/CRM system into an intelligent platform powered by AI. This solution integrates advanced AI capabilities across every layer of the platform, combining FastAPI backend intelligence with modern full-stack architecture.
ai-project.rag-desc: Designed and implemented RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines with semantic search capabilities using Qdrant vector database, enabling intelligent data retrieval and context-aware responses.
ai-project.backend-desc: Built scalable AI backend services using FastAPI and Python, seamlessly integrated into full-stack architecture with Next.js and Angular frontends. Queries .NET business services, processes data through AI models, and delivers intelligent insights to users.
ai-project.mcp-agents-desc: Developed Model Context Protocol (MCP) agents for workflow automation and external tool integration, enabling autonomous execution of complex business processes.
ai-project.data-management-desc: Managed embeddings, logs, metrics and AI context using Qdrant and PostgreSQL. Deployed models on Microsoft AI Foundry as the corporate cloud infrastructure.
reflection: Success is: Knowing your purpose in life, Growing to reach your fullest potential, and Planting seeds that benefit others.
